title: AVACH's Backrooms Textures
description: Replaces textures of some blocks with textures of backrooms.
body:
Just vanilla-style backrooms textures.

_Inspired by the movie "Backrooms" by Kane Parsons._

**What replaced:**
- Stripped Bamboo Block → Wallpapers
- Redstone Lamp → Celling Lamp
- Yellow Wool → Carpet
- Polished Diorite → Ceiling Tile

_You can use and edit these textures however you want. You can use it for your resource pack, for a mod, for a modpack, for anything._
